settings.heading: Contact us
settings.subtitle: WhatsApp is the fastest way to reach us. Our team is available Sunday to Thursday, 9am to 6pm Qatar time, and usually replies within a few hours.
settings.note_text: If you are asking about a specific product, a photo of the old bulb, fitting or gear is worth ten lines of description. Send it and we will identify it.
settings.success_text: We will get back to you shortly. For urgent help, reach us on WhatsApp.
settings.channels_text: Skip the form and reach the showroom team directly.

settings.title: Volume enquiry for a project or business?
settings.subtitle: Add items to a quote and our trade team sends volume pricing — same-day Doha and GCC delivery.
